name: New Kubernetes Service Account Created
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Leo Tsaousis (@laripping)
SIGMA Title: New Kubernetes Service Account Created
SIGMA Description: Detects creation of new Kubernetes service account, which could indicate an attacker's attempt to persist within a cluster.


False positives:
- Unknown

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%serviceaccounts%' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY New Kubernetes Service Account Created on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event matches LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%create%' AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%serviceaccounts%' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: New Kubernetes Service Account Created
